reviews.review_title: App seems ok, but has a few issues
reviews.review_description:
The app is generally hope, but has a few issues:

One issue I have noticed is that with the quest 3 at least, I cannot return to the main menu without quitting.  

Another is that I cannot find the seatbelt to adjust so I cannot move to the next step in the checklist.

Once those issues have been resolved, I would suggest that the developers work on enabling control with hands instead of the be controllers.

Thanks to some help from their customer service contact I found my mistake and now I’m very happy with this training tool.  I can go thru the process as many times as I want.  Pay attention to the selection of training before you set it to exam and you’ll be walked thru where to look to accomplish it.
